app.title: Secretbank
app.subtitle: The secrets manager that understands your dependency graph.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language used across the app.
settings.autoLockDescription: Lock the vault automatically after a period of inactivity.
settings.charterCooldownDescription: After a Vault Charter recovery, block unlock for 7 days. Defense in depth against stolen laptop + stolen charter.
settings.charterCooldownActive: Cooldown active — unlock blocked for ~{{hours}} more hours.
settings.charterCooldownClearConfirm: Clear the active cooldown? Future unlocks will work immediately.
settings.internalError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
settings.nvdApiKeyDescription: Used by the incident feed to poll the National Vulnerability Database with higher rate limits. Your key is encrypted inside the vault.
settings.vaultLockedWarning: Unlock the vault to change this setting.
settings.hibpCheckDescription: Check passwords against Have I Been Pwned. Only the first 5 characters of a SHA-1 hash are sent — your actual password never leaves this device.
settings.extensionSessionDescription: Password reveals stay unlocked for this long. Changing this setting will immediately invalidate all active extension sessions.
settings.extensionSessionRotateConfirmDescription: Changing the session timeout will immediately sign out all browser extension sessions. You will need to re-authenticate on next use.
settings.extensionMcpContextDescription: When enabled, the extension sends your current site and matched credential metadata to the local MCP server so AI editors (Claude, Cursor, etc.) can see what you are working on. No secret values are transmitted.
settings.extensionMcpContextWarning: Enabling this shares your browsing site context with AI editors via MCP. You can turn this off at any time.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.emptyDescription: Add one or drop a project folder.
inventory.createDescription: Register a new API key. The value is stored encrypted in your local vault.
inventory.errorNameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or less
inventory.errorScopeTooLong: Scope must be 200 characters or less
inventory.rotateDescription: Enter the new secret value. The old value is overwritten and this rotation is logged.
inventory.noUsages: No usages linked yet. Drop a project folder to auto-scan, or add one below.
inventory.linkUsageTitle: Link this key to a usage
inventory.noProjectsAvailable: No projects yet. Create one first.

factor.expired: Expired {{days}} day(s) ago. Rotate or revoke immediately.
factor.expiring_soon: Expires in {{days}} day(s). Plan a rotation.
factor.rotation_overdue: Rotation overdue by {{days}} day(s) beyond your policy.
factor.no_rotation_history: Never rotated; created {{days}} day(s) ago. Consider rotation.
factor.no_scope: No scope declared. Scoped keys limit blast radius.
factor.revoked: Revoked — this key should not be in use anywhere.
factor.compromised: Marked as compromised. Revoke and replace now.

inventory.deleteDescription: This permanently removes "{{name}}" from your vault. This cannot be undone.

card.miniGraphEmpty: Not used in any project yet

vault.createVaultLink: First time? Create a new vault
vault.pairWithDeviceLink: Have an existing device? Pair with it
vault.charterCooldownActive: Recovery cooldown active. Vault is locked for ~{{hours}} more hours.
vault.createVaultDescription: Choose a strong master passphrase to protect your vault.
vault.passphraseMinLength: Passphrase must be at least 12 characters
vault.alreadyInitialized: A vault already exists. Please unlock it instead.
vault.internalError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

charter.modeHelp: If you forget the passphrase, this is the only way to recover your vault. The relay server cannot help — your vault is end-to-end encrypted.
charter.modeNone: Skip — I accept that losing my passphrase means losing my vault
charter.modeSingleHelp: One printable document with 6 words and a 4-digit verifier. Store it offline.
charter.modeShamirHelp: Three separate documents — any 2 reconstruct the charter. Distribute to family / lawyer / safe.
charter.issuanceSubtitle: Save or print this once. We cannot show it again.
charter.warningHeader: This is the only recovery key for your vault.
charter.warningBody: Store it somewhere physical and secure. Anyone with this charter can recover your vault, but you also lose your vault forever if you lose it.
charter.confirmDoneBody: Once you close this dialog, the Charter will not be shown again. If you lose it, vault recovery becomes impossible.

recovery.title: Recover Vault with Charter
recovery.subtitle: Enter your Vault Charter to unlock and reset the passphrase.
recovery.phrasePlaceholder: WORD1 WORD2 WORD3 WORD4 WORD5 WORD6 - 1234
recovery.sharePlaceholder: Share {{index}} of 3: WORD1 WORD2 WORD3 WORD4 WORD5 WORD6 WORD7 - 1234
recovery.successToast: Vault recovered. Sign in with your new passphrase.
recovery.errorAbsent: This vault has no Vault Charter. Recovery is not available.
recovery.errorInvalid: Charter does not unlock this vault. Check spelling and verifier.

signIn.title: Connect to Secretbank
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to enable cloud sync, incident matching, and shared deployments. Your vault stays encrypted on this device.
signIn.keepOfflineHint: You can still use the local vault. Sign in any time from Settings.

oauth.providerMismatch: Unexpected provider in callback. Try again.
oauth.stateMismatch: OAuth state mismatch. Restart the sign-in flow.

cloudSync.heading: Cloud sync
cloudSync.description: Sign in to enable multi-device sync, incident matching, and shared deployments. Your vault stays encrypted on this device.

pairJoin.title: Pair with another device
pairJoin.description: Paste the pairing link from your existing Secretbank device. Both devices will exchange keys end-to-end — your master passphrase never leaves the source device unencrypted.
pairJoin.invalidLink: Not a valid pairing link. Expected Secretbank://pair?pin=…&pub=…
pairJoin.waiting: Waiting for the source device to send your credentials…

pair.title: Add a new device
pair.description: Open Secretbank on the new device, paste the link below, and the two devices will exchange keys end-to-end. Nothing private leaves either device unencrypted.
pair.waiting: Waiting for the new device to join…
pair.completed: Device paired successfully — you can now use sync from the new device.

onboarding.dropToScan: Drop to scan for API keys
onboarding.dropHint: Drop a folder to scan .env and config files, or a single file for quick check.
onboarding.scanPlaceholderDescription: Path: {{path}}. Full scan UI lands in T033–T035.
onboarding.scanMissingPath: No path supplied. Drop a folder onto the window to start.
onboarding.noDetectedHint: Drop a folder that contains .env or config files to find credentials.
onboarding.reviewSubtitle: Select keys to import into project {{project}}.
onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Let's get you set up in 3 quick steps.
onboarding.stepDropDescription: Drag a project folder anywhere in the window and we'll scan .env and config files for API keys.
onboarding.stepManualTitle: Or add your first key manually
onboarding.stepManualDescription: Prefer to enter a key yourself? Register a credential now and we'll keep it encrypted in your local vault.
onboarding.stepDoneDescription: Open your inventory to manage credentials, revoke keys, and track usage.
onboarding.rotatedExplain: Same variable in this project, different value — likely rotated.

railguardCta.title: Add AI guardrail rules?
railguardCta.body: Keep your AI editor from hardcoding API keys.

csv.title: Import passwords from Google
csv.deleteConfirmBody: The CSV contains plaintext passwords. Permanently delete now? (Not sent to trash — deleted immediately)

errors.vaultLocked: Vault is locked. Unlock the vault and try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please drop the CSV file again.
errors.invalidFormat: CSV format not recognized. Make sure this is a Chrome or Edge password export.

projects.title: Projects
projects.emptyDescription: Create a project or drop a folder to auto-create one.
projects.createDescription: Group credentials by the repository or app that consumes them.
projects.deleteDescription: This permanently removes "{{name}}" and its usage links. Credentials themselves stay in your vault.
projects.noLinkedCredentials: No credentials linked yet. Drop a folder to scan or add usages manually from a credential detail (coming in T039).

deployments.empty: No deployments yet. Add a URL to link this project to a hosted environment.
deployments.createDescription: Register a deployed environment for this project.
deployments.editDescription: Update the URL, platform, or environment.
deployments.deleteDescription: Remove "{{url}}"? Usages referencing this deployment will stay but lose their link.

graph.title: Dependency Graph
graph.subtitle: Trace credentials from issuers to deployments.
graph.empty: No credentials wired to projects yet — add a credential, then link usages.

mobile.subtitle: Tap a credential to see its impact.

credentialSection.warningBanner: {{count}} active incident(s) affect this credential. Review and consider revoking.
credentialSection.warningBanner_one: {{count}} active incident affects this credential. Review and consider revoking.
credentialSection.warningBanner_other: {{count}} active incidents affect this credential. Review and consider revoking.

railguard.title: RAILGUARD
railguard.subtitle: AI guardrail rules for your project — keeps AI editors from hardcoding API keys.

verify.failed: Chain broken — check per-device details below.

dialog.title: Revoke credential
dialog.warning: This will mark the credential as revoked. External services won't know yet — you'll still need to rotate or delete the key in the provider console.
dialog.alsoDeleteValueHint: The value will be permanently removed from your vault.

toast.flushError: Key was changed but failed to save to disk. Unlock and try again.
toast.notFoundError: Credential not found — it may have already been deleted.

dialog.title: Browser Extension Pairing Request
dialog.description: A browser extension is requesting to pair with this vault. Verify the fingerprint matches what the extension shows before approving.

error.vaultLocked: Vault is locked. Unlock the vault and try again.
error.vaultStorage: Failed to save pairing keys to vault.

githubIntegration.sectionDescription: Connect your GitHub App installation to scan repositories for exposed secrets.

installationCard.manageDisabled: Repo management coming in a future release

removeConfirm.title: Remove installation?
removeConfirm.body: This will remove installation {{id}} from Secretbank. The GitHub App will remain installed on GitHub — remove it there separately if needed.

githubIntegration.connectError: Failed to open GitHub. Check your browser settings.

dev.title: Developer Tools
dev.warning: These controls let you simulate a Pro subscription without a payment flow.
dev.notice: These controls are for testing only. They will be superseded by M10 payments.

lock.tooltip: This feature requires a Pro subscription
